name: make-it-real
description: A portable AI-agent skill for turning vague ideas into build-ready project specs, delivery scopes, and handoff tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Turn vague ideas into build-ready specs and AI-agent tasks
interface.longDescription: Use Make It Real to guide users from a rough idea through adaptive discovery, confirmed delivery scope, staged project documents, and AI-agent handoff tasks.
defaultPrompt: Help me turn a rough idea into a clear project plan.
Clarify my app idea and create coding-agent tasks.
Turn this vague product idea into a confirmed V1 scope.
